reviews.comment:
Quise almorzar algo ràpido y de calidad si buscar demasiado. Pensé que el lugar era el adecuado. en la caja no te facilitan el autoservice. en la mesa debi esperar a que la mesera se desocupara de los almuerzos formales, las opciones de rellenos  eran muy pocas para un vegano: carne pollo y jamón y queso.  Perdido por perdido pedí una de pollo y una de jamón y queso. Tardaron un siglo. Al cortarlas la sorpresa: era de carne. el reclamo  tardó otra eternidad,,,pero las sirvo frias..y otra vez a esperar. Mientras en la otra mesa devolvía los platos de un plato de pollo que según los comensales era incomible. Puedes consumir alfajores y golosinas sin problemas

(Translated by Google)
I wanted a quick and decent lunch without too much searching. I thought the place was suitable. At the register, they don't offer self-service. At the table, I had to wait for the waitress to finish with the formal lunches. The filling options were very limited for a vegan: meat, chicken, and ham and cheese. Since I had nothing to lose, I ordered one chicken and one ham and cheese. They took forever. When I cut into them, the surprise: they were meat. Complaining took another eternity... but they served them cold... and then I had to wait again. Meanwhile, at the next table, I was returning plates of chicken that, according to the diners, was inedible. You can eat alfajores and sweets without any problems.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16851497882005814309/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRbkozemN3EAE
